title: Omnisend vs SendGrid (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Omnisend vs SendGrid: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Omnisend and SendGrid comes down to your specific use case. Omnisend is built for e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together, while SendGrid targets developers and high-volume senders.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-Commerce Brands Wanting Email And Sms Together

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers and high-volume senders

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Omnisend wins for e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together, while SendGrid is stronger for developers and high-volume senders.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Omnisend or SendGrid?
faq.a: Omnisend starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from SendGrid to Omnisend?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
